title: Convert Timesheet PDFs to Excel for HR and Payroll Automation
metaTitle: Timesheet PDF to Excel Conversion - Automate HR Payroll Data
metaDescription: Convert PDF timesheets to Excel spreadsheets automatically. Extract hours, dates, and employee data for streamlined payroll processing.
h1: Timesheet PDF to Excel Conversion for HR and Payroll Automation

hero.headline: Transform PDF Timesheets into Structured Excel Data
hero.subheadline: Automate timesheet processing by converting PDF timesheets to Excel spreadsheets with extracted employee hours, dates, and project codes

summary: Convert PDF timesheets into structured Excel spreadsheets to streamline payroll processing and eliminate manual data entry. Extract employee names, hours worked, dates, overtime hours, and project codes from both digital and scanned timesheet documents.
whoItsFor: Small business owners managing contractor hours
whenThisIsRelevant: Weekly or bi-weekly payroll processing cycles
Converting paper timesheets from field workers
Consolidating timesheets from multiple departments or projects
supportedInputs: Digital PDF timesheet files from time tracking software
Scanned paper timesheets as PDF documents
Photos of handwritten timesheets taken with mobile devices
expectedOutputs: Excel files with employee data in separate columns
CSV files compatible with payroll software imports
commonChallenges: Manual typing of timesheet data takes hours each pay period
Calculation errors when transferring hours to payroll systems
Difficulty reading handwritten hours on paper timesheets
Time spent organizing data from multiple timesheet formats
howItWorksSteps: Upload your PDF timesheet files or drag multiple files for batch processing
AI automatically identifies employee names, dates, hours worked, and other timesheet fields
Review and customize which fields to extract based on your payroll system requirements
Download structured Excel or CSV files ready for payroll software import
whyPdfExcelAiFits: OCR technology reads both typed and handwritten timesheet entries
Batch processing handles multiple employee timesheets simultaneously
Custom field selection extracts only the data your payroll system needs
99%+ accuracy on clear timesheet documents reduces manual corrections
limitations: Handwritten hours may require manual verification for accuracy
Very faded or poor quality scanned timesheets may need preprocessing
Complex multi-project timesheets might need field customization for proper extraction

faq.question: Can it extract overtime hours separately from regular hours?
faq.answer: Yes, if your timesheet format clearly separates regular and overtime hours in different sections or columns, the AI can extract them into separate Excel columns.

faq.question: Does it work with handwritten paper timesheets?
faq.answer: It can process handwritten timesheets, but accuracy depends on handwriting clarity. Typed or printed timesheets provide the most reliable results.

faq.question: Can I process multiple employee timesheets at once?
faq.answer: Yes, batch processing allows you to upload multiple timesheet PDFs and convert them all simultaneously, with each document creating a row in your output spreadsheet.

faq.question: Will it extract project codes or department information?
faq.answer: If project codes or departments are clearly labeled on your timesheets, you can customize the field extraction to include this data in your Excel output.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
Free trial to test with your actual timesheet documents
Pay-as-you-go pricing with no monthly commitments
Compatible with major payroll software CSV import formats
exampleUseCases: Construction company processing weekly crew timesheets from job sites
Consulting firm extracting billable hours from contractor timesheets
Healthcare facility consolidating nurse scheduling timesheets for payroll
Manufacturing plant converting shift supervisor timesheets to Excel for wage calculations
